display.purpose: Page titles only; 30px ceiling, bottom-ruled. Encyclopedia pages, not hero banners.

headline.purpose: Article h2, bottom-ruled with faint border.

label.purpose: Sidebar group headers, tier badges, freshness chip, meta. The wiki's operational voice.

quote.purpose: Quoted source material only — the voice of the corpus.

shadows.name: overlay-dark
shadows.purpose: Transient overlays in dark theme: freshness popover, search dropdown, menus. Nothing else casts a shadow.

motion.name: duration-state
motion.purpose: Hover/focus/state changes; 150-250ms band, state-conveying only, honors prefers-reduced-motion.

breakpoints.name: content-collapse
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar stacks above content; topbar reflows to grid rows.

breakpoints.name: columns-collapse
breakpoints.purpose: See-also and navbox columns collapse to one.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The corp pill, reserved for the page's main action (Ingest, Rebuild). Dark-theme values shown; light uses #578200 fill with white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #99cc00; color: #1a1c10; border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 7px 18px; font: 600 13px/1.4 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #a9da21; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #99cc00; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #8ab800; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Chrome Chip Button
components.description: Small utility chrome (theme toggle, sidebar tools, top links). Deliberately un-pill: chrome is not a call to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-chrome { background: #161815; color: #a9b1a8; border: 1px solid #4b5147; border-radius: 2px; padding: 3px 9px; font: 700 12px/1.3 ui-monospace, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 180ms, color 180ms; } .ds-btn-chrome:hover { border-color: #99cc00; color: #e7e9e5; } .ds-btn-chrome:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(153, 204, 0, 0.36); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Inputs read as holes in the panel: page-bg fill, 1px strong border, green focus ring without glow.
components.css: .ds-input-search { width: 260px; min-height: 32px; padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid #4b5147; border-radius: 2px; background: #161815; color: #e7e9e5; font: 14px/1.3 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: #a9b1a8; } .ds-input-search:focus { outline: 2px solid rgba(153, 204, 0, 0.36); border-color: #99cc00; }

components.name: Tier Badge
components.description: Functional data vocabulary: tier color as text on a neutral chip, never a colored fill at 11px.
components.css: .ds-chip-tier { display: inline-block; font: 700 11px/1.25 ui-monospace, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.02em; padding: 1px 7px; border-radius: 2px; border: 1px solid #4b5147; background: #272b26; color: #c4b0f0; }

components.name: Freshness Chip
components.description: The topbar health statement — where Green-Means-Current lives. OK = brand green family; WARN = amber family.
components.html: fresh · built 12m ago stale · 2 sources behind
components.css: .ds-chip-fresh { display: inline-block; font: 700 12px/1.3 ui-monospace, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 2px; margin-right: 6px; } .ds-chip-fresh-ok { border: 1px solid #3f5220; background: #1c2412; color: #99cc00; } .ds-chip-fresh-warn { border: 1px solid #5c4a1a; background: #2a230f; color: #e3b341; }

components.name: Wikilink States
components.description: The four link states: working green (new), visited steel (the blue Wikipedia era is the visited past), TBD red (article missing), pending dashed muted.
components.html: event graph · hive governance · gate m · crash recovery
components.css: .ds-wikilinks { font: 15px/1.6 'Open Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #e7e9e5; margin: 0; } .ds-wl { color: #99cc00; text-decoration: none; } .ds-wl:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-wl:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(153, 204, 0, 0.36); outline-offset: 1px; } .ds-wl-visited { color: #6699cc; } .ds-wl-tbd { color: #ff7b72; cursor: help; } .ds-wl-pending { color: #a9b1a8; border-bottom: 1px dashed #a9b1a8; }

components.name: Source Quote
components.description: Sources speak in serif on parchment — the one place Georgia appears. Full 1px border, no left-stripe.
components.html: "Agents that build real systems must live inside the graph of cause, evidence, authority, review, and consequence." — lovyou.ai
components.css: .ds-quote { margin: 0; padding: 9px 14px; border: 1px solid #a07f3a; border-radius: 2px; background: #231d10; color: #e6d3a6; font: italic 400 15px/1.55 Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif; }

narrative.overview: A reading room attached to a working factory: shelves of compiled, cross-linked knowledge in front, the hum of the ingest-compile-publish machinery audible through the wall. The wiki keeps its encyclopedia grammar — dense resizable sidebar, floating infoboxes, citation footers, tier badges — because that grammar is what makes a records surface trustworthy and navigable. The skin changes: the bootstrap Wikipedia look retires in favor of Transpara's corporate language — near-neutral blacks and whites, the lime-olive green as the single working color, Raleway headings over Open Sans body. The two themes are equals: CSS authored dark-first, shipped default light, dark one toggle away and persisted. Both hold WCAG 2.1 AA on the reader surface.
keyCharacteristics: Encyclopedia density and navigation grammar, Transpara corporate skin
One working color (the corp green) carrying links, primary actions, and current/healthy signals
Dark-first dual themes, AA in both
Flat at rest; elevation only for transient overlays
Operational chrome speaks monospace; sources speak serif; the wiki speaks Open Sans
Fully self-contained assets — air-gap friendly, zero external requests

rules.name: The Green-Means-Current Rule
rules.body: In chrome, green is a statement of health — fresh, synced, passing, live. Never use the brand green decoratively on a stale, failing, or unknown state; a green ornament on a broken thing is a lie the whole design is built to avoid.

rules.name: The AA-Both-Themes Rule
rules.body: Every text/background pair passes 4.5:1 in both themes at body size. Brand-exact #669900 and #ff6600 are large-text/non-text-only in light theme. No exceptions for brand accuracy — the ramp tokens exist precisely so brand and AA never conflict.

rules.name: The One-Orange Rule
rules.body: Signal Orange appears at most once per view. Two orange things means neither is the most important thing.

rules.name: The Sources-Speak-In-Serif Rule
rules.body: Georgia appears only inside quoted source material. Everything the wiki itself says is sans or mono. A reader should be able to tell at a glance whether the corpus or the compiler is talking.

rules.name: The No-Shouting Rule
rules.body: Nothing on a reader page exceeds 30px. Emphasis comes from weight, rule lines, and space — never from scale jumps, gradient text, or letterspaced all-caps headlines.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: If it doesn't float over the page, it doesn't cast a shadow. Panels, infoboxes, cards, and banners are flat surfaces with borders — a shadowed card on a records page is decoration pretending to be information.

dos: Do keep dark as the default theme and hold every body-text pair to 4.5:1 in both themes.
Do use #99cc00 (dark) / #476b00 (light) for links and #578200 for light primary buttons — the corp ramp is the palette, not just the flagship hex.
Do keep the encyclopedia grammar: dense sidebar, floating infobox, TOC panel, citation footers, 15px/1.6 body at ~65-75ch.
Do vendor Raleway and Open Sans as woff2 in-repo; the site must render identically with zero network access.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on every transition; keep transitions 150-250ms, state-conveying only.
Do keep the freshness/provenance layer visible on every reader page — it is the trust surface.
donts: Don't drift into the AI-mystique aesthetic: no neon glow on the green, no pure-black backgrounds, no scanlines, no cyber gradients, no sci-fi terminal cosplay.
Don't let it rot into the corporate intranet: no gray-on-gray text, no undesigned states, no dense-but-joyless neglect.
Don't import transpara.com's marketing grammar: no heroes, no card-grid feature sections, no airy section spacing, no circles background wallpaper.
Don't use border-left/border-right thicker than 1px as a colored accent — callouts use full borders + tinted backgrounds.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, hero metrics, or any radius between 6px and pill.
Don't put #669900 or #ff6600 on body-size text in light theme — large text and accents only.
Don't load anything — fonts, scripts, styles, images — from an external host. If it isn't in the repo, it isn't in the design.
Don't use green on a component that isn't healthy/current, and don't show two orange elements in one view.
